name: LM Studio
description: Desktop app for running local LLMs on Mac

version_check.note: LM Studio download page scraping no longer reliable. If JSON API unavailable, fall back to https://api.github.com/repos/lmstudio-ai/lmstudio/releases/latest

download.note: Architecture-aware redirect to versioned DMG. {ARCH} = arm64 or x64.

notes: bundle_id changed from com.elementlabs.lmstudio to ai.elementlabs.lmstudio. Version check changed from HTML scrape to JSON API.
